name: Wood Fence
description: Classic wood fencing that adds warmth, privacy, and curb appeal to any property. We install cedar, pine, and pressure-treated options built to handle the elements.
idealFor: Residential privacy, backyard enclosures, decorative borders

name: Vinyl Fence
description: Low-maintenance vinyl fencing that looks great year after year with no painting or staining required. Resistant to rot, insects, and harsh weather.
features: Resistant to rot, rust, and insects
Privacy, picket, and ranch rail styles
Available in white, tan, and gray
idealFor: Homeowners who want lasting good looks with minimal upkeep

name: Chain Link Fence
description: Durable, affordable chain link fencing for security and containment. Galvanized or vinyl-coated options available for residential and commercial applications.
idealFor: Security perimeters, dog runs, commercial properties, ball courts

name: Aluminum Fence
description: Elegant aluminum fencing that combines the look of traditional wrought iron with rust-free, low-maintenance durability. Perfect for pools, gardens, and front yards.
idealFor: Pool enclosures, front yards, gardens, decorative boundaries

name: Farm & Ranch Fence
description: Heavy-duty agricultural fencing for livestock containment and property boundary marking. We install barbed wire, high-tensile, board, and post-and-rail fencing.
idealFor: Livestock containment, pasture division, large rural properties
